data.Name: Unresolved
data.Description: This Hitch is active and may be Triggered to Gain Chi or Twists

data.Name: Resolved (Persona)
data.Description: The Hitch is Resolved and instead the Character may access an additional Persona.

data.Name: Resolved (Core)
data.Description: The Hitch is Resolved and instead the Character may access an additional Core.

data.Name: Resolved (Edge)
data.Description: The Hitch is Resolved, the Character gains a Resolved Hitch Edge.

data.Name: Resolved (Monster)
data.Description: The Hitch is Resolved but the Character becomes a Monster of the same Facet.
